# No third-party packages are strictly required — the generator uses only
# Python's standard library (json, urllib, datetime) so it runs anywhere
# Python 3.9+ runs, including GitHub's default ubuntu-latest runners.
#
# Kept here for future extension (e.g. if you add `requests` for nicer HTTP
# handling, or `icalendar` for stricter RFC5545 validation).
requests>=2.31.0
